caption: The video captures a formal event, likely a lecture or presentation, taking place in a well-lit auditorium with wooden paneling on the walls. A speaker stands at a podium on the left side of the stage, addressing an attentive audience seated in rows of chairs. The audience members appear engaged, some leaning forward slightly as they listen. On the right side of the stage, another individual is seated, possibly a moderator or co-speaker, holding a microphone and looking towards the audience. The setting suggests an organized and professional atmosphere, with the focus on the exchange of information between the speakers and the attendees. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, indicating the possible affiliation or sponsorship of the event.
